content.full_text:
Memorandum

To: Advice Files - Sections 82034, 87206
Date: May 18, 1982
File No.: M-82-089

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Diane Maura Fishburn

Subject: Oil Rights

Oil and other mineral rights are interests in real property within the meaning of Section 82034. If they are rights for land located in California, they are reportable by all Article II filers. See Dunn v. County of Los Angeles, 155 Cal. App. 2d 789, 803 (1957).

DMF:plh
cc: Janis
     Alice
     Jeanette
